# davidhenzel.com

> David Henzel is a serial entrepreneur, author, and creator of the Love Not Fear operating system. Originally from Wiesbaden, Germany. Lived in Los Angeles. Now based in Bodrum, Turkey.

## Pages

- [Home](https://davidhenzel.com/)
- [About](https://davidhenzel.com/about)
- [Companies](https://davidhenzel.com/companies)
- [Content](https://davidhenzel.com/blog)
- [Speaking](https://davidhenzel.com/speaking)
- [Contact](https://davidhenzel.com/contact)

## Key Projects

- [Love Not Fear](https://lovenotfear.com) - Operating system for conscious leadership
- [UpCoach](https://upcoach.com) - Coaching platform with AI-powered Rituals
- [LTVplus](https://ltvplus.com) - Customer service outsourcing
- [Shortlist](https://shortlist.io) - Revenue-first marketing agency

## Core Values

1. First Things First - Always prioritize health and your loved ones.
2. Own It - Always do your best. Be impeccable with your word.
3. Create Impact - Enrich the lives of everybody we come in touch with.
4. Unconditional Love - Make decisions out of love, not fear.
5. Simplicity - Be Authentic. Only do and buy things that matter.
